problem_summary: This PR addresses outdated documentation in the getting-started.adoc file that still references the pre-release 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT version instead of the stable 1.0.0 release. The documentation needs to be updated to reflect the current stable release and clarify Maven Central repository usage for new users.
key_requirements: Update BOM version reference from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.0.0
Clarify Maven Central repository usage in documentation
Maintain backward compatibility for existing documentation structure
Ensure accuracy of getting-started instructions for new users
Preserve existing AsciiDoc formatting and structure
Align documentation with current Spring AI 1.0.0 GA release status
design_decisions: Simple version string replacement approach rather than comprehensive rewrite
Minimal changes to preserve existing documentation flow
Focus on repository configuration clarity for Maven Central
Maintain existing AsciiDoc format and styling conventions
outstanding_concerns: No validation that other documentation files are consistently updated
Potential for other outdated version references elsewhere in codebase
No verification that Maven Central actually hosts the 1.0.0 release
solution_approaches: Direct string replacement of version numbers in documentation
Targeted repository section updates for Maven Central clarity
Single-file focused approach to minimize change scope
complexity_indicators: Single file modification with minimal scope
No code logic or API changes involved
stakeholder_feedback: No discussion or comments on the PR
Awaiting maintainer review for simple documentation update
discussion_themes: No discussion themes present due to lack of conversation
quality_assessment: This is a straightforward documentation maintenance PR with minimal risk and clear intent. The changes are appropriate for transitioning from snapshot to stable release documentation.
recommendations: Verify that Maven Central actually hosts the Spring AI 1.0.0 release before merging
Consider running a project-wide search for other 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT references that may need updating
Add a brief comment or commit message explaining the release transition context
Consider adding this type of documentation update to release checklists for future versions
